fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date that the accounting period will begin.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the accounting period.

fields.name: New Fiscal Year
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to use the accounting period to start a fiscal year.

fields.name: Closed
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the accounting period belongs to a closed fiscal year.

fields.name: Date Locked
fields.tooltip: Specifies if you can change the starting date for the accounting period.

fields.name: Average Cost Calc. Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies how the average cost for items in the accounting period was calculated.

fields.name: Average Cost Period
fields.tooltip: Specifies the period type that was used in the accounting period to calculate the average cost.
